company.name: SGenovix Technologies
company.tagline: Innovating the Future with AI & Software Solutions
company.description: SGenovix Technologies is a technology company specializing in Artificial Intelligence, Web Development, Mobile Applications, Cloud Solutions, ERP, CRM, UI/UX Design, and Digital Marketing.

services.title: AI Development
services.description: Custom AI applications, chatbots, computer vision, machine learning, NLP, and automation solutions.

services.title: Website Development
services.description: Responsive websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, PHP, Laravel, and modern technologies.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Android, iOS, and Flutter applications for startups and enterprises.

services.title: ERP Solutions
services.description: Enterprise Resource Planning systems for schools, hospitals, industries, and businesses.

services.title: CRM Solutions
services.description: Customer Relationship Management software to manage clients and sales.

services.title: Cloud Solutions
services.description: Cloud deployment, hosting, migration, AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud services.

services.title: Cyber Security
services.description: Security assessments, penetration testing, secure infrastructure, and cyber consulting.

services.title: Digital Marketing
services.description: SEO, social media marketing, branding, and online advertising.

portfolio.name: School ERP
portfolio.description: Complete ERP for schools with attendance, fees, results, and communication.

portfolio.name: Hospital Management System
portfolio.description: Appointment booking, patient management, billing, and pharmacy integration.

portfolio.name: AI Chatbot
portfolio.description: Custom AI chatbot for websites and businesses.

faqs.question: What services do you provide?
faqs.answer: We provide AI Development, Website Development, Mobile Apps, ERP, CRM, Cloud Solutions, Cyber Security, and Digital Marketing.

faqs.question: Do you build AI chatbots?
faqs.answer: Yes. We develop custom AI chatbots powered by modern Large Language Models.

faqs.question: Do you provide website hosting?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide hosting, deployment, and maintenance services.

faqs.question: Can I request a quotation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Please share your project requirements and we'll prepare a customized quotation.
